nodes.name: ActiveAgentsPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Displays a live panel of actively running agent sessions, fetching heartbeat data and per-issue details to render run cards with recovery chip overlays.

nodes.name: ActiveAgentsPanel
nodes.summary: Main panel component that queries live runs, resolves associated issues, and renders run cards with configurable limits and grid layout.

nodes.name: RunCardRecoveryChip
nodes.summary: Renders a small recovery action chip on a run card that indicates the current recovery state and offers user interaction.

nodes.name: ActivityCharts.tsx
nodes.summary: Provides a suite of dashboard chart components for visualizing agent run activity, issue priority distribution, issue status trends, and success rates over the last 14 days.

nodes.name: RunActivityChart
nodes.summary: Renders a stacked bar chart of agent run completions and failures grouped by day over the last 14 days.

nodes.name: PriorityChart
nodes.summary: Renders a stacked bar chart showing issues created per day broken down by priority level.

nodes.name: IssueStatusChart
nodes.summary: Renders a stacked bar chart of issues grouped by status category over the last 14 days.

nodes.name: SuccessRateChart
nodes.summary: Renders a line chart of agent run success rate percentage over the last 14 days.

nodes.name: ActivityRow.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a single activity feed row with actor identity, action verb, entity links, and relative timestamp for audit/activity stream display.

nodes.name: ActivityRow
nodes.summary: Renders an activity feed row, resolving agent or user identity and building entity links for the event target.

nodes.name: agent-config-defaults.ts
nodes.summary: Exports the default initial values object used when creating a new agent configuration form.

nodes.name: agent-config-primitives.tsx
nodes.summary: Provides a comprehensive set of low-level form primitives for agent configuration, including toggle fields, draft inputs, collapsible sections, and a file-path chooser.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses draft-commit pattern for all input primitives to buffer edits before committing to parent state.

nodes.name: ToggleWithNumber
nodes.summary: Combines a boolean toggle with an optional numeric input that appears when the toggle is enabled, used for rate-limit style settings.

nodes.name: CollapsibleSection
nodes.summary: Renders a collapsible form section with a title, optional icon, and open/close toggle for grouping related config fields.

nodes.name: AutoExpandTextarea
nodes.summary: A textarea that automatically expands its height to fit content, with a configurable minimum row count.

nodes.name: DraftInput
nodes.summary: Text input that holds a local draft state and commits the value on blur or Enter, preventing excessive parent re-renders.

nodes.name: DraftTextarea
nodes.summary: Auto-expanding textarea with draft-commit pattern, deferring value propagation until blur or keyboard commit.

nodes.name: ChoosePathButton
nodes.summary: A button that opens a dialog for the user to select a file system path, returning the chosen path to the parent config form.

nodes.name: AgentActionButtons.tsx
nodes.summary: Exports RunButton and PauseResumeButton UI components for triggering and pausing/resuming agent execution.

nodes.name: AgentConfigForm.tsx
nodes.summary: The main agent configuration form (1840 lines) encompassing all settings for creating and editing agents, including adapter selection, model picker, environment variables, and advanced options.
nodes.languageNotes: Massive single-file form with 12 sub-components covering adapter configuration, model selection, and thinking effort settings.

nodes.name: AgentConfigForm
nodes.summary: Core form component that manages the full agent creation/edit lifecycle, coordinating between adapter config, model selection, secrets, environments, and overlay state.

nodes.name: ModelDropdown
nodes.summary: Complex model selection dropdown that supports grouping by provider, custom model creation, model detection, and refresh, with an experimental badge for preview models.

nodes.name: AdapterTypeDropdown
nodes.summary: Dropdown for selecting the agent adapter type, filtering out disabled types and rendering descriptive labels.

nodes.name: CheapModelSection
nodes.summary: Config section for enabling and selecting a cheaper secondary model for cost-reduction on less critical tasks.

nodes.name: AgentIconPicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Provides an icon picker popover for selecting a custom emoji/icon for an agent, along with a display component for the chosen icon.

nodes.name: AgentIconPicker
nodes.summary: Popover-based icon picker that renders available agent icons as a grid and calls back with the selected icon name.

nodes.name: AgentProperties.tsx
nodes.summary: Displays a key-value properties panel for an agent, including adapter type, model, status badge, and reports-to identity.

nodes.name: AgentProperties
nodes.summary: Renders the agent property sidebar panel, fetching the agent's config and resolving adapter/model display names.

nodes.name: ApprovalCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a card for a human-approval request showing the requester identity, approval payload, timestamp, and current approval status.

nodes.name: ApprovalCard
nodes.summary: Main approval card component that combines identity display, payload renderer, and status icon into a single tappable card layout.

nodes.name: ApprovalPayload.tsx
nodes.summary: Provides typed payload renderer components for various approval request types (hire-agent, CEO strategy, budget override, board approval) with a dispatch component.

nodes.name: BoardApprovalPayloadContent
nodes.summary: Renders the detailed content of a board approval payload, including structured fields and skill list for complex approval flows.

nodes.name: ApprovalPayloadRenderer
nodes.summary: Dispatcher component that selects the correct payload renderer based on the approval type field.

nodes.name: AsciiArtAnimation.tsx
nodes.summary: Canvas-based ASCII art animation component that renders animated sprite frames measured per character using a custom sprite sizing algorithm.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses canvas character measurement to compute sprite dimensions for pixel-perfect ASCII art rendering.

nodes.name: AsciiArtAnimation
nodes.summary: Core animation component managing RAF-based frame cycling, canvas sizing, and character-grid rendering for ASCII sprite sheets.

nodes.name: BillerSpendCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Displays a spend summary card for a billing entity, showing current period usage and quota bar visualization.

nodes.name: BillerSpendCard
nodes.summary: Renders the biller spend card with usage breakdown, quota progress bar, and rollover date.

nodes.name: BreadcrumbBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Top-of-page breadcrumb navigation bar that renders context-aware breadcrumbs from BreadcrumbContext and integrates sidebar toggle and plugin toolbar slots.

nodes.name: BreadcrumbBar
nodes.summary: Renders the breadcrumb header bar with responsive sidebar toggle, breadcrumb trail, and plugin-injected toolbar actions.

nodes.name: BudgetIncidentCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Displays and allows editing of a budget incident record, showing the spend amount, state label, and inline dollar input for resolution.

nodes.name: BudgetIncidentCard
nodes.summary: Renders the budget incident card with editable spend amount, state label, and action buttons for resolving or dismissing the incident.

nodes.name: BudgetPolicyCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a budget policy card with editable spend limit, window type selector, status indicator, and save/delete controls.

nodes.name: BudgetPolicyCard
nodes.summary: Full budget policy card with inline editing for limit amount and window, optimistic save/delete mutations, and status-color feedback.

nodes.name: BudgetSidebarMarker.tsx
nodes.summary: Small sidebar indicator component that shows a budget status dot in the navigation sidebar for budget-aware pages.

nodes.name: ClaudeSubscriptionPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Displays Claude API subscription quota information organized by billing windows, with fill-level indicators and window period labels.

nodes.name: ClaudeSubscriptionPanel
nodes.summary: Renders the Claude subscription panel listing quota windows with usage bars and detail text for each window.

nodes.name: CloudAccessGate.tsx
nodes.summary: Gate component that restricts access to cloud-only features, rendering pending bootstrap or no-access pages when the user lacks required board permissions.

nodes.name: CloudAccessGate
nodes.summary: Renders children when cloud access is granted, otherwise shows bootstrap-pending or no-access placeholder pages.

nodes.name: CodexSubscriptionPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Displays Codex subscription quota information with model-specific and aggregate quota rows, fill-level indicators, and window period details.

nodes.name: CodexSubscriptionPanel
nodes.summary: Renders the Codex subscription panel with per-model and aggregate quota window rows.

nodes.name: CommandPalette.tsx
nodes.summary: Global command palette overlay that searches across issues, agents, and projects, providing keyboard-driven navigation shortcuts throughout the application.

nodes.name: CommandPalette
nodes.summary: Full command palette component with multi-entity search, keyboard navigation, recent items, and router-integrated navigation actions.

nodes.name: CommentThread.tsx
nodes.summary: The primary issue comment thread component (1085 lines) rendering comment cards, timeline events, approvals, and the compose editor with draft persistence and markdown support.

nodes.name: CommentThread
nodes.summary: Top-level comment thread component managing comment list, timeline events, compose box with draft persistence, and optimistic submission.

nodes.name: CommentCard
nodes.summary: Renders a single comment with author identity, markdown body, reactions, approval content, and copy/edit actions.

nodes.name: TimelineEventCard
nodes.summary: Renders a structured timeline event (status change, assignment, run status) with actor name, action label, and timestamp.

nodes.name: CompanyPatternIcon.tsx
nodes.summary: Generates and renders a deterministic SVG pattern avatar for a company based on hashing the company name, producing a unique geometric data-URL image.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements a custom mulberry32 PRNG seeded from the company name hash to produce deterministic color/pattern generation.

nodes.name: makeCompanyPatternDataUrl
nodes.summary: Generates a canvas-based pattern data URL unique to a company name using deterministic PRNG-driven geometry and color.

nodes.name: CompanyPatternIcon
nodes.summary: React component that renders a company avatar using the generated pattern data URL, with memoization and fallback initial support.

nodes.name: CompanySettingsSidebar.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders the company settings navigation sidebar with section nav items linking to members, billing, secrets, and other company-level settings pages.

nodes.name: CompanySwitcher.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a list of available companies in the sidebar switcher with status dots, allowing the user to navigate between company workspaces.

nodes.name: CompanySwitcher
nodes.summary: Renders a company list with per-company status indicators, linking each to its dashboard and highlighting the active workspace.
